name: Specimen Inspection
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>標</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>本</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>閲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>覧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Reveal 1 "Fossil Fusion" in your hand; send 1 monster from your hand to the GY, and if you do, declare a Type and a Level, then your opponent looks at their hand and Deck, and sends 1 monster with the declared Type and Level from one of them to the GY (if possible). You can only activate 1 "Specimen Inspection" per turn.
eff: Reveal 1 "Fossil Fusion" in your hand; send 1 monster from your hand to the GY, and if you do, declare a Type and a Level, then your opponent looks at their hand and Deck, and sends 1 monster with the declared Type and Level from one of them to the GY (if possible). You can only activate 1 "Specimen Inspection" per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
